description: Export brick data to a file for later import or post-processing.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('brick export ...') via command interface

keywords.name: id
keywords.description: ID of the brick to export.

keywords.name: filename
keywords.description: Name of the binary file. If not specified, then the file {“brick.p3brk” in 3D; “brick.p2brk” in 2D} is used. If no extension is given, the the extension {“.p3brk” in 3D; “.p2brk” in 2D} is used.

keywords.name: skip-errors
keywords.description: If specified, the operation overwrites any existing file with the set name; otherwise, a dialog will query the user’s input if a file with the specified name exists.
